accurate.why: All listed appropriations categories are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 appropriations for military construction, VA, and related agencies.

exceptions_conditions.why: Mentions that the bill sets forth requirements and restrictions for using funds, though without specifying the major policy riders.

effective_dates.why: High-level summary appropriately omits granular effective date details.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major appropriations categories at the structural level.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names all agencies, programs, and funds listed.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
